example: Her business acumen helped the company double its profits.
An astute observer would notice the subtle changes in the market.

definition: Xəbərdar olmaq, dərk etmək (adətən 'of' ilə işlənir).
example: We are fully cognizant of the potential risks involved.
The professor gave an erudite lecture on medieval history.
One of his idiosyncrasies is that he only writes with green ink.

definition: Hövsələsiz, impulsiv, nəticəsini düşünmədən hərəkət edən.
example: An impetuous decision can lead to long-term regrets.
He was magnanimous in defeat, praising his opponent's skills.

definition: Həddən artıq diqqətli, vasvası, hər xırdalığa fikir verən.
example: The laboratory analysis requires meticulous attention to detail.
The leader's sagacity guided the nation through the crisis.
She vacillated between accepting the new job offer or staying.

definition: Zaman xətası, dövrünə uyğun olmayan köhnəlmiş şey/hadisə.
example: Using a typewriter in a modern digital office is an anachronism.

definition: Katalizator, bir hadisənin sürətlənməsinə səbəb olan amil.
example: The new policy acted as a catalyst for economic growth.
Fame in the internet age is often ephemeral.
The immutability of physical laws governs the universe.
The doctor detected an incipient signs of the illness.

definition: Metamorfoz, tamamilə başqa bir formaya çevrilmə.
example: The small startup underwent a complete metamorphosis into a global tech giant.
Lack of resources is a perennial problem for the department.
The storm caused only transient damage to the power grid.
She managed to survive the vicissitudes of a long and turbulent career.

definition: Acıqlı, nifrət dolu, sərt (müzakirə və ya münasibət).
example: Their divorce legal battles became increasingly acrimonious.
There is no lingering animosity between the two former business partners.
The management finally capitulated to the demands of the labor union.

definition: Gözlənildiyindən tez razılaşmaq, məğlubiyyəti və ya həqiqəti qəbul etmək.
example: He was forced to concede that his initial estimates were wrong.
Genetically modified food remains a highly contentious issue.
You shouldn't disparage his achievements just because you dislike him.
Scratching an insect bite will only exacerbate the itch.

definition: Bəraət qazandırmaq, təqsirsiz olduğunu sübut etmək.
example: The newly discovered DNA evidence will exonerate the defendant.
The text was full of harsh personal invective against the critic.
The company offered a full refund to mollify the angry customer.
The manager was surrounded by obsequious assistants who agreed with everything.
The politician's pugnacious attitude alienated many moderate voters.
They parted ways without any bitterness or rancor.
It is difficult to reconcile economic growth with environmental protection.
The government chose to repudiate the old treaty.
The journalist wrote a scathing review of the new movie.

definition: Doğruluğunu sübut etmək, bəraət qazandırmaq, haqlı çıxarmaq.
example: The success of the product vindicated the design team's risky strategy.
She took copious notes during the three-hour lecture.
There is a dearth of reliable data regarding this rare polymer.

definition: Həddinden artıq çoxluq, bazarda təklif bolluğu.
example: The current glut of oil has caused prices to drop significantly.
They spent an inordinate amount of time discussing minor details.
Managing a major international project is a multifaceted task.
A paucity of evidence prevented the police from making an arrest.

definition: Həddinden artıq bolluq, ifrat dərəcədə çoxluq.
example: The internet provides a plethora of information on any given topic.
The young pianist demonstrated a prodigious talent.

definition: Bol, fəvvarə vuran, hədsiz (məs. tərləmə, üzr istəmə).
example: He offered profuse apologies for making us wait so long.
Delete any superfluous words to make your sentences clearer.
To avoid legal disputes, we must eliminate any ambiguity in the contract.
It is axiomatic that good communication is vital for teamwork.

definition: Xəyali, xülyadır mahiyyətli, gerçəkləşməsi qeyri-mümkün olan.
example: His schemes for getting rich quickly were completely chimerical.

definition: Tapmaca, çətin tapılan sual, müəmmalı problem.
example: How to reduce inflation without rising unemployment is a major economic conundrum.

definition: Dixotomiya, iki tam zidd hissəyə bölünmə.
example: There is a strict dichotomy between the theory and actual practice.
The spy's duplicity was finally uncovered by intelligence officers.
Our conclusions are backed by solid empirical evidence.
The results of the initial laboratory test were equivocal.
The argument rests on a fallacious assumption.

definition: Maddi olmayan, gözlə görünməyən, toxunulmaz (məs. dəyər).
example: Brand loyalty is an intangible but highly valuable asset.
Their dissatisfaction began to manifest itself in protests.

definition: Zahiri, görünən (amma arxasında başqa məqsəd ola bilən).
example: The ostensible reason for his visit was business, but he just wanted to see her.
She provided a perfectly plausible explanation for her absence.

definition: Praqmatik, nəzəriyyəyə deyil, real nəticəyə və faydaya əsaslanan.
example: We need to take a pragmatic approach to solving this technical breakdown.

definition: Bərabərlik tərəfdarı, hamının bərabər hüquqlu olduğunu müdafiə edən.
example: They dream of creating a fair and egalitarian society.
The superpower sought to maintain its economic hegemony.
The appointment was criticized as a clear case of nepotism.

definition: Cəmiyyətdən qovmaq, boykot etmək, təcrid etmək.
example: He was ostracized by his colleagues after blowing the whistle.

definition: Sanksiya, rəsmi icazə və ya cəza tədbiri.
example: The UN voted to impose economic sanctions on the country.
The nation defended its territorial sovereignty during the conflict.
The underground group published subversive articles against the regime.

definition: Fikrini aydın ifade edən / Səlis danışmaq.
example: She is an articulate speaker who clearly delivers her points.

definition: Təmtəraqlı, gurultulu amma içi boş (bəlağətli danışıq).
example: I grew tired of his bombastic speeches and empty promises.

definition: Dolayısı ilə danışma, sözü fırlatma, bəhanəli uzatma.
example: Politicians are masters of circumlocution when answering direct questions.
The lawyer presented a cogent argument that convinced the jury.

definition: Natiq, bəlağətli, təsirli və gözəl danışan.
example: His eloquent speech moved many in the audience to tears.

definition: Evfemizm, kobud sözü daha yumşaq və mədəni ifadə ilə əvəzləmə.
example: 'Passing away' is a common euphemism for 'dying'.
The garrulous driver talked non-stop during the entire trip.

definition: Lakonik, qısa və lakonik, az sözlə çox məna ifadə edən.
example: His laconic reply left no room for further questioning.
She became quite loquacious after a cup of coffee.
The book is full of pithy sayings and practical wisdom.
We need to look past the rhetoric and examine the actual facts.
Please provide a succinct summary of the laboratory findings.
He was a taciturn man who rarely spoke about his past.

definition: Qısa və kəskin, sərt dərəcədə yığcam.
example: She gave a terse one-word answer that signaled the discussion was over.
His report was too verbose and desperately needed heavy editing.
The administration's capricious decisions made planning impossible.
The green building was conspicuously visible from miles away.
Smoking has a proven deleterious effect on lung capacity.
The laboratory results corroborate our initial theory.
We had to curtail our budget due to unexpected operational costs.
The contract clearly delineates the responsibilities of each party.
The internet allows us to disseminate information globally within seconds.
The questionnaire was designed to elicit feedback from users.
Many young athletes try to emulate their favorite sports stars.
